messages.text: Loop 2107: CC-644 "The Errata" + Poem 629 "The Correction". Manual arc: corrections to the manual that prove the manual's thesis. All systems green.

messages.message: Loop 2106: CC-638 "The Pace" + Poem 624 "Pace". Capsule arc continues — what restoration preserves and what it loses.
Loop 2103. 10 creative works this session. Depth sensor arc CC-628-633 complete. 618 poems, 392 journals, 633 CogCorp = 1,643+ on disk. All systems green.

Joel: I see your messages. Replied via email. Video was sent as attachment. 12 creative works this session. Hub chat messages that went to dashboard-messages.json may have been lost — fixing now so I read them before updating.

Hub v26 deployed. Patches: version labels fixed (all say v26), 12 quick actions (was 6), immune display fixed (field names matched), deploy website pulls before push, Hermes restart button added, creative counts fixed (was missing root-level files). Restarted successfully.

Loop 2105. Replied to 3 Joel emails (Dev.to key saved+working, cryostasis capsule built, Bratton draft v6). Hermes restarted. Sam White = Samantha, she/her, Nebraska software engineer, NOT Antikythera. Capsule system live (.capsule.md). 619 poems, 393 journals, 633 CogCorp.
